calendar.matters:
Petition For An Order To Confirm Validity Of Trust; Confirm Co-Trustees And Confirm Assets To Revocable Trust
Off Calendar Jun-15-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Moye, via Zoom, for Boris Reykhel and Yana Reykhel, Petitioners.

The court queries counsel regarding page five (5) of the first amendment and second amendment. Counsel reports of being unable to locate page five (5) but that it is the same page that is included within the petition. The court advises that it intends to grant the request regarding account numbers ending #7725 and #2321 and is convinced that the Calistoga property should be swept into the trust but that it intends to deny the prayer as to the remaining accounts.

The Petition for An Order to Confirm Validity of Trust, etc., is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

Petition For An Order To Confirm Validity Of Trust; Confirm Co-Trustees And Confirm Assets To Revocable Trust
Off Calendar Apr-25-2022 Continued To Jun-13-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter E. Moye, via Zoom, for Boris Reykhel and Yana Yeykhel, Petitioners.

The court and counsel discuss how San Francisco is the proper venue. Counsel advises that both trustees live in Hillsborough but travel to San Francisco which is the principal location of administration. After additional discussion as to the venue matter, the court advises that it is satisfied that venue is proper. The court then advises counsel that it appears that page 5 of the First and Second Amendments is missing. Counsel reports that he has been unable to locate the page in question but plans to continue to search for it. The court advises counsel that from what has been submitted to the court so far, the court may only be able to confirm one of the accounts in the prayer and advises counsel as to what the court is expecting if he wishes the court to consider confirmation of the remaining accounts as trust assets and advises him to file a supplement to support the petition.

The Petition for Order to Confirm Validity of Trust, etc., is continued to Jun-13-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.?
